name_cn:
New in stock🅰️🅰️
Ce 2023 New Cabas Full 16 Series Tote~Large tote body + simple opening design makes the whole bag concise and generous, lightweight, large capacity, and easy to open. Compared to the old soft version, this one feels more practical!!
Style: Light mature, professional women, or as a diaper bag
Capacity: Extra large capacity~
Model: 112583 Monogram
Dimensions: 37×15×27
